stemHtml: At the same latitude the geostrophic wind is less than the gradient wind around an anticyclone with equal pressure gradient because the..

options.a: centrifugal force is added to the pressure gradient.
options.b: effect of coriolis is added to friction.
options.c: coriolis effect opposes the centrifugal force.
options.d: centrifugal force opposes the pressure gradient.
